text:
I AS1ROLOGY
BOOK REVIEWS
STAR TELLER - BY SRI. S. SRIDHARAN - MADRAS
(SOUTH INDIA)
TRANSIT OF PLANETS ON THE BIRTH CHART -
R.GRAO
The Book underreview is in erudite compilation of
ancient NADI Wisdom. As such, it makes for a curiously
interesting reading. The method adopted tomake the predictions
is by juxtaposing the Transit chart (at time of query) with the
native's Birth Chart. All the case studies are based upon
inscrutable and and mysterious inerpretations defying logical
analysis. These 'Lessons ofNadi' as the author puts it, are
presented in the form of a dialogue. The ordinary will find it
difficult to comrehend and apply the same in practice, but
nevertheless, it does not fail to impress.
HARA S AMUDRIKARATHNA
DR. H.S. VENK.ATARAO. M.A.,M.ED. FICA.,
Prof: of Education (Tetd) - (SOUTH INDIA)
"TRANSIT OF PLANETS ON THE BIRTH CHART'
The book "TRANSIT OF PLANETS ON THE BIRTH
